_schema_notes.description: FRU face scene crop configuration. Each key is the scene image filename stem (without extension).

face_anchor.center: [cx, cy] - pixel coordinate in the scene image where the face center should be placed
face_anchor.face_w: Width in pixels of the oval face placement zone in the scene (face-only skin region, no hair)
face_anchor.face_h: Height in pixels of the oval face placement zone in the scene (face-only skin region, no hair)
face_anchor.bbox: [x1, y1, x2, y2] - bounding box of the oval face placement zone in the scene image (for reference only, not used by pipeline)

_schema_notes.gender: List of allowed genders for this scene. Values: 'male', 'female', 'unknown'. Omit to allow all.
